news.headline: The market didn't like what it heard from the Fed and its new leader Kevin Warsh

news.headline: Why United States Antimony Stock Was a big Winner on Wednesday
news.summary: A director at the company made a five-figure purchase of its shares.

news.headline: Qualcomm eyes $10 billion AI shortcut as smartphone growth slows
news.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) helped define the smartphone era. Now the chip giant is striving to prove it can play a far bigger role in the artificial intelligence boom. That may take a lot. Qualcomm is in talks to buy AI chip firm T

news.headline: AI is hurting Apple in more ways than one: it may force iPhone price increases
news.summary: CEO Tim Cook said in a recent interview that the situation is "unsustainable."

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $722.51 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $740.96 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Strong Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $722.51 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NFLX PUT — enter $2.79–$3.09, target $4.41+, stop $1.76.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed lower with SPY -1.25% and QQQ -1.01%. Composite sentiment -64 (Strong Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by spy trend, market breadth (a/d), qqq / mega-cap tech. VIX at 17.02 (+4.03%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Leadership came from Technology; Communication lagged. Today's standouts: AVGO +4.30%, AMD +1.02%. Laggards: META -5.44%, MSFT -3.79%. Carrying NFLX as the top idea into tomorrow (7.5/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
